name: Meetfibe
source: bigtechnology.com article; meetfibe.com; LinkedIn (Andrew Yeung, founder, NYC)
notes: Formerly known as Andrew's Mixers, rebranded to Fibe. NYC-based tech events and community company with 50K+ members. Founder Andrew Yeung is based in NYC.

name: Boxerjavelin
notes: No information found for Boxerjavelin / boxerjavelin.com in any public database, Crunchbase, LinkedIn, or news sources. Cannot identify company, industry, or location.

name: Incisive
notes: Incisive Ventures, early-stage B2B software VC founded by Martin Tobias, headquartered in Seattle, WA. $10.5M Fund I closed 2025.

name: Victory Park Capital
notes: Headquartered at 150 North Riverside Plaza, Chicago, IL 60606. Alternative credit and equity investment firm.

name: Withleela
notes: AI compliance monitoring platform for fintech and finance companies. Leela AI, Inc. at 321 Walnut Street #441, Newton, MA 02460. Founded 2017, co-founded by Henry Minsky.

name: Outersignal
notes: OuterSignal Inc. is incorporated and registered in New York, NY (447 Broadway, 2nd FL). PitchBook lists Tampa, FL as HQ but the company's registered address and Built In NYC presence suggest NY as primary location. Customer intelligence platform for ecommerce brands.

name: Sphere
notes: sphere.so domain is ambiguous — many companies named Sphere exist. Could not definitively identify which company uses sphere.so or its location/industry without additional context. Domain does not appear in major databases under a clear single entity.

name: F2Vc
notes: F2 Venture Capital is headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel (Hagag North Tower, 28 Ha'Arbaa Street). Early-stage VC focused on Israeli startups.

name: Youpop
notes: Creator economy platform built for multi-hyphenate creators. Headquartered in New York, NY per PitchBook and CBInsights.

name: Nimbi
notes: Nimbi Supply is a UK-based plastic-free shaving brand (compostable razor handles). Founded by Anna Reid and Gemma Doyle. Cardiff/London UK HQ. Distinct from Nimbi S/A (Brazilian supply chain SaaS); domain nimbi.supply matches the UK CPG brand.

name: Carirewards
notes: Cari Rewards Corp. — payments and rewards platform for the hospitality/restaurant industry. Founded 2025, headquartered in New York, NY. Raised $3.1M seed round. Primary site appears to be usecari.com.

name: Reddogcap
notes: Red Dog Capital — seed-stage investment fund focused on FinTech, Healthcare, Future of Work, and Real Estate tech (B2B, SaaS). Address listed as 2400 Webster St, San Francisco, CA 94115.
